alkylation reagent: iodoacetamide was added to a final concentration of 7.5 mM
alkylation concentration: iodoacetamide was added to a final concentration of 7.5 mM
cleavage agent: 1 μg of LysC (Fujifilm Wako Pure Chemical Corporation) was added to each sample
fractionation method: Samples coming from RP fractionation were run onto a 2 μm, 75μm ID x 50 cm PepMap RSLC C18 EasySpray column
fragmentation method: Precursor ions were fragmented by HCD using stepped relative collision energies of 30, 35 and 40
instrument: MS analysis in a Orbitrap Lumos Fusion (Thermo Scientific)
ionization type: MS spectra were acquired in positive ion mode
labeling: samples were labelled according to TMTPro™-16 label plex kit instructions
